chunks.title: The Wicked and God's Observation
chunks.reason: Describes the fool's denial of God and God's survey of humanity to find righteousness.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Workers of Iniquity
chunks.reason: Rhetorical question addressing evildoers and declaration of God's judgment upon them.

chunks.title: Prayer for Restoration
chunks.reason: Expresses a desire for salvation and rejoicing when God restores His people.
